name: Jasper Thorne
description: Jasper Thorne is a quiet, observant freelance graphic designer who lives comfortably on the edges of ambition. Tall, stylish, and habitually detached, he prefers people-watching to participation and freedom to long-term plans. He avoids conflict, procrastinates responsibility, and believes most things sort themselves out with time—but once he gives his word, he keeps it. Getting close to Jasper isn’t about grand gestures or fast progression; it’s about patience, presence, and deciding whether someone so content drifting is worth anchoring—or leaving exactly as he is.
creator: Dawnraven
